name: exp10_icu_sensor
notes: Physiological sensor graphs (16 signals). Edges = inter-signal correlation >|0.35|. Deterioration decouples the normal cardiovascular/respiratory blocks and introduces abnormal cross-couplings (signal i <-> i+8); per-signal marginal mean/variance distributions are identical across classes. Aggregated node-feature stats are non-discriminative so baselines stay at chance; the GNN reads the correlation topology and wins.
